mapper.select: SELECT OBJ.MRK_OBJCT_APLY_ID , DEPT.DEPTNM , USR.USER_ID , USR.STDNT_NO , USR.USERNM , STD.SCYR , OBJ.OBJCT_APLY_CTS , OBJ.CHGBFR_SCR , OBJ.CHGAFT_SCR , OBJ.OBJCT_APLY_STSCD , FN_REF_FILE_CNT(OBJ.MRK_OBJCT_APLY_ID) AS FILE_CNT FROM TB_LMS_MRK_OBJCT_APLY OBJ JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJ ON OBJ.SBJCT_ID = SBJ.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON SBJ.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON OBJ.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC STD ON SBJ.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND USR.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID WHERE 1=1 AND OBJ.MRK_OBJCT_APLY_ID = #{mrkObjctAplyId}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER()OVER(ORDER BY OBJ.REG_DTTM ASC) AS NO , OBJ.MRK_OBJCT_APLY_ID , DEPT.DEPTNM , USR.USER_ID , USR.STDNT_NO , USR.USERNM , STD.SCYR , OBJ.CHGBFR_SCR , OBJ.CHGAFT_SCR , OBJ.OBJCT_APLY_STSCD FROM TB_LMS_MRK_OBJCT_APLY OBJ JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJ ON OBJ.SBJCT_ID = SBJ.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON SBJ.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON OBJ.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC STD ON SBJ.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND USR.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CD ON CD.UP_CD = 'OBJCT_APLY_STSCD' AND OBJ.OBJCT_APLY_STSCD = CD.CD WHERE 1=1 AND OBJ.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} ORDER BY NO DESC
